name: MK-212
description: MK-212 has been used in trials studying the treatment of Alcoholism.

interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of MK-212 can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.

interactions.name: Pregabalin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of MK-212 can be decreased when used in combination with Pregabalin.

interactions.name: Mianserin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of MK-212 can be decreased when used in combination with Mianserin.

interactions.name: Orlistat
interactions.description: The serum concentration of MK-212 can be decreased when it is combined with Orlistat.
